underlying_goal: Research reference designs across multiple repos and guides to inform project planning, then verify the reliability of research findings and update project files accordingly
friction_detail: Claude treated unverified agent research claims as facts and pre-filtered alternatives with unverified pros/cons; user had to push back twice on intellectual rigor.
brief_summary: User wanted thorough multi-wave research of reference designs with verification; research completed but user caught Claude accepting unverified claims as fact, and project file updates were only partially done before context limits hit.
